# Copilot Workspace Instructions

## Delegation Rule for UI/UX
When the task includes UI, UX, Razor views, layout, navigation, CSS styling, or page composition, invoke the custom sub-agent named "UX UI Specialist" first, then apply its output.

## Lab 2 constraints
- Implement only Index and Details for entities unless explicitly asked otherwise.
- Keep links between list and details pages.
- Maintain complete navigation (menu and breadcrumbs).
- Prefer mock repository data flow and MVC conventions.
- Favor a non-standard visual identity over default Bootstrap template look.
